You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/modules/StorageMaps/views/list/components/ErrorStatusCell.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 6 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 59
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
   58        <Button
   59          variant={ButtonVariant.link}
   60          isInline

```

### Fix 2
Line: 58
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Popover

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   57      >
   58        <Button
   59          variant={ButtonVariant.link}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 11
Rule [sd-test-popover-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Popover is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Popover renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Popover may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:
  importedName: Popover
  localName: Popover
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Code context:
```
   10    ButtonVariant,
   11    Popover,
   12    Text,

```

### Fix 4
Line: 14
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-text-text-d-ts-textvariants-removed]:
Type-alias 'TextVariants' was removed (type-alias): Exported enum `TextVariants` was removed — migrate to `ContentVariants`.
  Matching props (use on `ContentVariants` instead): a, blockquote, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p, pre, small

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Text/Text.d.ts
Before: enum: TextVariants

Incident context:
  importedName: TextVariants
  localName: TextVariants
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
From: TextVariants
To: ContentVariants
Replacement: ContentVariants
Member mappings:
  h2 -> h2
  h4 -> h4
  h6 -> h6
  small -> small
  blockquote -> blockquote
  pre -> pre
  a -> a
  h5 -> h5
  h1 -> h1
  p -> p
  h3 -> h3

Code context:
```
   13    TextContent,
   14    TextVariants,
   15  } from '@patternfly/react-core';

```

### Fix 5
Line: 12
Rule [semver-text-component-import-deprecated]:
MIGRATION: Replace <Text> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - Text.ouiaId  →  Content.ouiaId
  - Text.component  →  Content.component
  - Text.className  →  Content.className
  - Text.ouiaSafe  →  Content.ouiaSafe
  - Text.children  →  Content.children
  - Text.isVisitedLink  →  Content.isVisitedLink

Remove <Text> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove Text from the import statement.

Incident context:
  importedName: Text
  localName: Text
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted

Code context:
```
   11    Popover,
   12    Text,
   13    TextContent,

```

### Fix 6
Line: 13

MIGRATION: Replace <TextContent> with props on <Content>.

Property mapping:
  - TextContent.className  →  Content.className
  - TextContent.children  →  Content.children
  - TextContent.isVisited  →  Content.isVisitedLink (renamed)

Remove <TextContent> from JSX and move its props to <Content>.
Also remove TextContent from the import statement.

  importedName: TextContent

  module: @patternfly/react-core

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/modules/StorageMaps/views/list/components/ErrorStatusCell.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 59):** `Button.variant` type changed — but the value `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type (`'link'` is in both old and new). No code change needed.

**Fix 2 (Line 58):** Icon children to `icon` prop on Button. Looking at lines 58-64, the Button's children is `{children}` which is a ReactNode prop, not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. This is a generic `children` pass-through — not an icon-only or icon+text pattern. The rule's incident context mentions `parentName: Popover`, but the actual children content is `{children}` (a variable). No change needed — this Button doesn't contain icon elements directly.

**Fix 3 (Line 11):** Popover behavioral change regarding Popper's `appendTo` default. This is a test-related advisory. No source code change needed for the component itself — it's about test files. No companion test files were listed.

**Fix 4 (Line 14):** `TextVariants` removed → use `ContentVariants`. Need to replace import and all usages.

**Fix 5 (Line 12):** `Text` deprecated → use `Content`. Need to replace import and all JSX usages.

**Fix 6 (Line 13):** `TextContent` deprecated → use `Content`. Need to replace import and all JSX usages. Since both `Text` and `TextContent` map to `Content`, I need to handle this carefully:
- `<TextContent>` wrapper → `<Content>` 
- `<Text component={TextVariants.p}>` → `<Content component={ContentVariants.p}>`
- Import: Remove `Text`, `TextContent`, `TextVariants`, add `Content`, `ContentVariants`

In PF v6, `<Content>` replaces both `<Text>` and `<TextContent>`. The `<TextContent>` wrapper becomes `<Content>`, and `<Text component={...}>` also becomes `<Content component={...}>`. Since `<Content>` can serve as both wrapper and text element, the nested structure `<TextContent><Text>...</Text></TextContent>` becomes `<Content><Content component={...}>...</Content></Content>`.

Let me write the updated file:

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `ButtonVariant.link` is still valid in the new type union — `'link'` exists in both old and new variants. |
| Fix 2 | Icon children to `icon` prop on Button | **No change needed** | The Button's children is `{children}` (a pass-through ReactNode variable), not an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`. The rule doesn't apply to this usage. |
| Fix 3 | Popover transitive behavioral changes (Popper `appendTo`) | **No change needed** | This is a test-advisory rule. No companion test files were listed, and no source code change is required for the component itself. |
| Fix 4 | `TextVariants` removed → `ContentVariants` | **Applied** | Replaced `TextVariants` import with `ContentVariants`. Updated both `TextVariants.p` references to `ContentVariants.p` (lines 41, 47). |
| Fix 5 | `Text` deprecated → `Content` | **Applied** | Removed `Text` import. Replaced both `<Text component={...}>` JSX elements with `<Content component={...}>` (lines 41, 47). |
| Fix 6 | `TextContent` deprecated → `Content` | **Applied** | Removed `TextContent` import. Replaced `<TextContent>` wrapper element with `<Content>` (lines 39, 49). Since `Content` was already being added for Fix 5, a single `Content` import covers both replacements. |
